final:
// // This module selects input 'a' when option is high and input 'b' when option is low
module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input option,
	 output reg [7:0] selection
    );always @(a or b or option)
	begin
		selection <= option ? a : b;
	end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects input 'a' when option is high and input 'b' when option is low
